creator: empty.japan
caption:
The North of Kyoto holds a special place in my heart. Local Shrines have such a mysterious atmosphere, forests and mountains keep various secrets and you always have a feeling that you are on a real adventure because there are no crowds of tourists.
That is why my first travel guides will be about the Northern parts of Kyoto Prefecture ☺️
The place on the video is called Kayabuki-no-Sato. It is famous for its thatched-roof houses that are very flammable so it is protected by an elaborate system of 62 water hoses that automatically spray water if a fire breaks out.
Twice a year (in May and December) this system is tested by the local fire brigade and it is a breathtaking view 🥹

transcription.text: 君の中にある赤と青き蝉 それらが結ばれるのは
